name: Venison Grillades
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces Rotel diced tomatoes and chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound venison strips to 1/4 inch thick.
2. On a well-greased grill, brown meat on both sides and cut into manageable sized pieces. Set aside.
3. In a 12-quart pot, combine oil and flour. Stir continuously over medium-high heat until roux is a rich brown color (the darker, the better).
4. Add onions and continue to stir for 1-2 minutes.
5. Add the rest of the vegetables, stirring as needed until onions are clear.
6. Slowly add bouillon to the mixture, stirring thoroughly. If added too quickly, the roux may separate. When the mixture has stabilized, add tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Add wine and meat (including any accumulated drippings from grilling).
8. Cover the pot and simmer until the meat is just tender (1-2 hours), stirring occasionally.
9. Add seasonings and simmer for an additional 20 minutes more.
10. Serve over grits.
